title: subworkflow - aws block all s3 bucket public access
description:
Subworkflow to block all public access to an S3 bucket for security compliance

This subworkflow applies comprehensive public access restrictions to S3 buckets to prevent unintended data exposure.

Parameters:

bucketName: (Required) S3 bucket name to restrict
awsRegion: (Required) AWS region where bucket resides
blockPublicAcls: (Optional) Block public ACLs - default true
ignorePublicAcls: (Optional) Ignore public ACLs - default true
blockPublicPolicy: (Optional) Block public bucket policies - default true
restrictPublicBuckets: (Optional) Restrict public bucket access - default true
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection

Returns confirmation of public access block configuration applied
guide:
## 🔒 **Subworkflow to Block All S3 Bucket Public Access**

🛡️ This subworkflow applies comprehensive public access restrictions to S3 buckets to prevent unintended data exposure and ensure compliance with security policies.

Blocks all four public access vectors: ACLs, bucket policies, and inherited policies.

---

### ⚙️ **Parameters**

- **bucketName** (Required): 🪣 S3 bucket name (not ARN)
- **awsRegion** (Required): 🌍 AWS region
- **blockPublicAcls** (Optional): 📵 Block public ACLs - default true
- **ignorePublicAcls** (Optional): 🙈 Ignore existing public ACLs - default true
- **blockPublicPolicy** (Optional): 🧱 Block public bucket policies - default true
- **restrictPublicBuckets** (Optional): 🚫 Restrict public bucket access - default true
- **dynatraceawsconnection** (Required): 🔑 AWS OIDC connection

---

### 🛡️ **Public Access Block Features**

✅ **Four Independent Controls:**
- Block public ACLs on bucket and objects
- Ignore any existing public ACLs
- Block public bucket policies
- Restrict access via public bucket policies

---

### 🧠 **Usage Context**

- ✅ Security remediation
- ✅ Compliance enforcement (SOC 2, PCI-DSS)
- ✅ Automated response to public access risk
- ✅ Bucket hardening

---

apply-public-access-block.name: apply-public-access-block

input.PublicAccessBlockConfiguration: { "BlockPublicAcls": {{ input()["blockPublicAcls"] | lower }}, "IgnorePublicAcls": {{ input()["ignorePublicAcls"] | lower }}, "BlockPublicPolicy": {{ input()["blockPublicPolicy"] | lower }}, "RestrictPublicBuckets": {{ input()["restrictPublicBuckets"] | lower }} }

apply-public-access-block.description: Apply public access block configuration to S3 bucket
